name: rty-terraform-azure-cdn-classic-migration
description: Guides the full Azure CDN Classic to Azure Front Door migration for Terraform-managed environments

interface.shortDescription: Guide the Azure CDN Classic to Azure Front Door migration for Terraform environments.
interface.longDescription: Covers the full two-phase migration: Portal-side resource creation followed by Terraform state removal, import, plan reconciliation, and multi-environment rollout. Handles Key Vault-backed certificates, BIP module vs flat resource patterns, and known azurerm v4 provider pitfalls.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me migrate Azure CDN Classic to Azure Front Door in Terraform.
